 {"id":"bd-1231s","title":"Task: Web UI pipeline deck","description":"## Scope\nImplement Pipeline deck with visual builder and run monitor.\n\n## Implementation\n- Visual builder (ReactFlow) for steps and dependencies.\n- Run list + status details.\n- Execute/cancel/resume actions.\n\n## Logging\n- Client logs for run actions (dev only).\n\n## Tests\n- E2E: create pipeline -> run -> observe status.\n- Unit: pipeline graph validation.\n\n## Acceptance Criteria\n- Pipelines can be built and executed via UI.\n","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-23T22:53:40.144578384Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-23T23:12:34.688586364Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1231s","depends_on_id":"bd-15amw","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:24Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-1231s","depends_on_id":"bd-35i7a","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:24Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-125c","title":"Task: Implement Agent Mail registration","description":"## Purpose
Register the project with Agent Mail via MCP or CLI during initialization.

## Scope
- Detect if Agent Mail MCP server is available
- Call ensure_project with absolute project path as project_key
- Store registration status in .ntm/config.toml
- Handle offline/unavailable gracefully

## Acceptance Criteria
- Project registered with Agent Mail when available
- Config records registration timestamp
- Graceful degradation when Agent Mail unavailable
- Warning message if registration fails

## Technical Notes
Reuse existing agentmail client code in internal/
Use absolute path as project_key per Agent Mail conventions","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-19T05:29:05.178680141Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-19T08:02:00.995948302Z","closed_at":"2026-01-19T08:02:00.995885985Z","close_reason":"Completed","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-125c","depends_on_id":"bd-38gl","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:24Z","created_by":"import"}]}

 {"id":"bd-12u4u","title":"Feature: Ensemble Orchestrator - Spawning and mode assignment","description":"# Feature: Ensemble Orchestrator - 3-Stage Pipeline Coordinator

Orchestrates the full ensemble pipeline: Intake → Mode Run → Synthesis.

## Pipeline Stages

### Stage 1: Intake (Coordinated)
1. Check context pack cache
2. If miss: generate context pack via ContextPackGenerator
3. If context thin: prompt user with targeted questions
4. Cache context pack for reuse

### Stage 2: Mode Run (Parallel)
1. Load ensemble definition (e.g., 'project-diagnosis')
2. Resolve mode IDs to full ReasoningMode objects
3. Generate prompts via PromptInjector (base + preamble + schema)
4. Spawn N agents in parallel tmux windows
5. Monitor progress, token spend, early stop conditions
6. Collect outputs as agents complete

### Stage 3: Synthesis (Sequential)
1. Validate all outputs against OutputSchema
2. Run mechanical merging (grouping, de-duplication)
3. Spawn Synthesizer agent with merged inputs
4. Spawn Disagreement Auditor with synthesis + raw outputs
5. Combine into final report

## EnsembleManager Core
```go
type EnsembleManager struct {
    Config          *EnsembleConfig
    ContextGen      *ContextPackGenerator
    PromptInjector  *PromptInjector
    BudgetTracker   *BudgetTracker
    OutputCollector *OutputCollector
    Synthesizer     *Synthesizer
    Auditor         *DisagreementAuditor
    Metrics         *MetricsCollector
}

func (m *EnsembleManager) Run(ensemble string, problem string) (*EnsembleResult, error)
func (m *EnsembleManager) RunStage1() (*ContextPack, error)
func (m *EnsembleManager) RunStage2(ctx *ContextPack) ([]ModeOutput, error)
func (m *EnsembleManager) RunStage3(outputs []ModeOutput) (*SynthesisReport, error)
```

## Agent Assignment Strategy

### Default: Round-Robin
Distribute modes across available agent types (claude, codex, gemini).

### Affinity-Based
Some modes work better with certain agents:
- Formal modes → Claude (strong logical reasoning)
- Creative modes → Gemini (divergent thinking)
- Analytical modes → Codex (code understanding)

### User Override
Allow explicit agent assignment per mode.

## State Tracking

Track ensemble state for recovery and monitoring:
```go
type EnsembleState struct {
    SessionName  string
    Ensemble     string
    Stage        PipelineStage  // intake, mode_run, synthesis
    Agents       []AgentState
    Budget       BudgetState
    StartedAt    time.Time
}
```

## Files
- internal/ensemble/manager.go - Core orchestration
- internal/ensemble/assignment.go - Agent assignment
- internal/ensemble/state.go - State tracking
- internal/swarm/ensemble_integration.go - Tmux/swarm integration","notes":"Feature complete: EnsembleManager, 3-stage pipeline, assignment strategies, state tracking all implemented. Fixed import cycle and type mismatches to enable ensemble_experimental build. All tests pass.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-23T07:25:50.551686121Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T07:46:10.370388893Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T07:46:10.369986895Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-12u4u","depends_on_id":"bd-1kthb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:24Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-12u4u","depends_on_id":"bd-2ouwm","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:24Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-12u4u","depends_on_id":"bd-49fb9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:24Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-12u4u","depends_on_id":"bd-n9bcu","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:24Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-12u4u","depends_on_id":"bd-wx2qv","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:24Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-12ua0","title":"Task: Write unit tests for Intake & Context Pack system","description":"# Task: Intake System Unit Tests

Comprehensive tests for context generation, questions, and caching.

## Test Coverage

### ContextPackGenerator (context_generator_test.go)
```go
func TestContextPackGenerator_Generate_FullProject(t *testing.T)
func TestContextPackGenerator_Generate_MinimalProject(t *testing.T)
func TestContextPackGenerator_DetectLanguages_Go(t *testing.T)
func TestContextPackGenerator_DetectLanguages_TypeScript(t *testing.T)
func TestContextPackGenerator_DetectLanguages_Mixed(t *testing.T)
func TestContextPackGenerator_DetectFrameworks_GoMod(t *testing.T)
func TestContextPackGenerator_DetectFrameworks_PackageJson(t *testing.T)
func TestContextPackGenerator_ParseReadme_Full(t *testing.T)
func TestContextPackGenerator_ParseReadme_Missing(t *testing.T)
func TestContextPackGenerator_GetRecentCommits(t *testing.T)
func TestContextPackGenerator_CountOpenIssues(t *testing.T)
```

### Targeted Questions (questions_test.go)
```go
func TestShouldAskQuestions_ThinContext(t *testing.T)
func TestShouldAskQuestions_RichContext(t *testing.T)
func TestSelectQuestions_PrioritizesRequired(t *testing.T)
func TestMergeAnswers(t *testing.T)
func TestDefaultQuestions_AllHaveIDs(t *testing.T)
```

### Context Cache (context_cache_test.go)
```go
func TestContextCache_GetPut_RoundTrip(t *testing.T)
func TestContextCache_Get_CacheMiss(t *testing.T)
func TestContextCache_Get_Expired(t *testing.T)
func TestContextCache_Invalidate(t *testing.T)
func TestContextCache_ComputeHash_Deterministic(t *testing.T)
func TestContextCache_IsStale_TTL(t *testing.T)
func TestContextCache_IsStale_GitCommit(t *testing.T)
```

## Logging Requirements
- Log cache hit/miss decisions (project hash, ttl)
- Log detected languages/frameworks for each fixture
- Log thin-context reasons that trigger questions
- Log number of questions selected and merged answers

## Test Fixtures
- testdata/context/full-project/ (go.mod, README, src/)
- testdata/context/minimal-project/ (just main.go)
- testdata/context/no-readme/

## Files
- internal/ensemble/context_generator_test.go
- internal/ensemble/questions_test.go
- internal/ensemble/context_cache_test.go","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-23T08:45:10.080962341Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T02:40:27.304250485Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T02:40:27.303974766Z","close_reason":"Completed","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-12ua0","depends_on_id":"bd-15yvf","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:24Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-12ua0","depends_on_id":"bd-1azv5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:24Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-12ua0","depends_on_id":"bd-1ilu8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:24Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-12ua0","depends_on_id":"bd-2ouwm","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:24Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-12vyy","title":"Task: REST metrics, analytics, context, git endpoints","description":"## Scope\nExpose metrics/analytics, context packs, and git coordination via REST.\n\n## Endpoints\n- Metrics: /metrics, /metrics/compare, /metrics/export, /metrics/snapshot, /metrics/save, /metrics/list, /analytics.\n- Context: /context/build, /context/{id}, /context/stats, /context/cache (DELETE).\n- Git: /git/sync, /git/status.\n\n## Logging\n- Log snapshot IDs, context pack IDs, and git sync outcomes.\n\n## Tests\n- Unit: validation + error codes.\n- Integration: snapshot -> export; context build -> fetch; git status output.\n\n## Acceptance Criteria\n- Endpoints mirror CLI/robot functionality.\n- Metrics exports preserve existing semantics + schema.\n","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-23T22:50:18.491586359Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T18:55:42.734323245Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T18:55:42.734304640Z","close_reason":"All REST endpoints implemented: Metrics (/metrics, /metrics/compare, /metrics/export, /metrics/snapshot, /metrics/snapshots), Analytics (/analytics), Context (/context/build, /context/{id}, /context/stats, /context/cache), Git (/git/sync, /git/status).
